authors: Patrik Åker Jenni Mäenpää Liudmila Voronova a Department for Media and Communication Studies
Swedenb Faculty of Information Technology and Communication Sciences
raw_title: The Time Dimension of Visual Journalism: The Rhythm of Photographic “Truth Claims”
title_en: The Time Dimension of Visual Journalism: The Rhythm of Photographic “Truth Claims”
title_zh: 视觉新闻的时间维度：摄影“真相主张”的节奏
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了视觉新闻中时间如何影响摄影作品声称真实性的方式。它研究了照片呈现“真相”的节奏和时间因素，帮助理解新闻图片如何构建可信度。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how time affects the way photographs claim truth in visual journalism. It explores the rhythm and temporal aspects of photographic 'truth claims,' helping understand how news images build credibility.
research_direction_zh: 视觉新闻研究，关注时间因素如何塑造新闻摄影的真实性建构和传播效果。
research_direction_en: Visual journalism research focusing on how temporal factors shape the construction and communication of truth in news photography.
